result.summary: Found 3 visual issues on the BetRivers Pennsylvania casino page, including truncated navigation items, clipped game card titles, and partially visible content on the right edge.

issues.description: Navigation tabs are cut off on the right side. The 'Hot Ga...' tab label is truncated and not fully visible, and there are likely more tabs hidden beyond the viewport without a clear scroll indicator.
issues.suggestion: Add a visible scroll indicator (e.g., fade gradient or arrow) on the right side of the navigation tab bar to signal horizontal scrollability, or implement a scrollable tab strip with proper overflow handling.

issues.description: Game cards in both 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are partially clipped on the right side (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...' and 'MUNC MI...' titles are cut off), making it unclear what those games are.
issues.suggestion: Add a visible scroll affordance or partial reveal with a gradient overlay to indicate horizontal scrollability, ensuring users understand these cards are swipeable.

issues.description: The third game card column in both game sections is partially cut off without any visual cue (like an arrow or fade) to indicate more content is available horizontally.
issues.suggestion: Apply a right-side gradient fade overlay over partially visible cards to visually communicate that the list is horizontally scrollable.
